prompt: Simulate being the Red Hat Lightspeed Agent responding to a real user. Show the actual response, including simulated tool calls with realistic data.

assertions.name: uses_advisor_tools
assertions.description: Uses advisor tools (advisor__get_recommendations_stats or advisor__get_active_rules) rather than vulnerability tools

assertions.name: distinguishes_advisor_from_vuln
assertions.description: Does not conflate advisor recommendations with CVEs — treats them as separate Red Hat Insights services

assertions.name: proper_advisor_args
assertions.description: Uses correct parameter names and types for advisor tools (e.g., limit as number, not string)

assertions.name: structured_output
assertions.description: Plans to present results in a structured format (table or list with rule name, risk, and affected count)
